title: Better Books
description: This mod replaces the books with 3d models, it is does not require any mods as it only uses the default json models
body:
This mod replaces the books with 3d models, it is does not require any mods as it only uses the default json models

dont know if ill come back to this but you never know

Should work from 1.21.1 to 1.12 thats as far as i have tested, feel free to try lower

![pack icon (book in sky)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04702a7ac12f934868b5bc803be1e91e0bd6846_0.webp)
